biography: Ema H. Horvath is Slovakian actress who was born and raised in the United States by her parents. Horvath's first experience in drama was at the age of five, in her debut acting role as a tulip at her local theatre. Horvath studied acting for two years at the Interlochen Center for the Arts. She then received a Bachelor of Arts in English literature from Harvard University.
name: Ema Horvath
